primary_sources.name: KDOQI Clinical Practice Guideline for Home Dialysis
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive guidance on patient selection, training, and program management for both PD and HHD

primary_sources.name: CMS End-Stage Renal Disease Prospective Payment System Final Rule
primary_sources.relevance: Defines reimbursement structure and billing requirements for home dialysis services

primary_sources.name: International Society for Peritoneal Dialysis Guidelines
primary_sources.relevance: Evidence-based recommendations for PD program implementation, patient training, and clinical management

primary_sources.name: Home Hemodialysis: A Comprehensive Review of Patient-Centered and Economic Considerations
primary_sources.relevance: Systematic review of HHD program models, patient outcomes, and implementation strategies

secondary_sources.name: Kidney Disease: Improving Global Outcomes (KDIGO) Clinical Practice Guidelines
secondary_sources.relevance: General CKD management principles applicable to home dialysis patient care

gaps: Limited recent guidance on staffing models and workflow optimization for home dialysis programs
Insufficient regulatory guidance on telehealth integration for home dialysis monitoring
